svg.title: AXI4-Lite CSR Address Map — 16KB Space
svg.desc: Vertical memory map showing CSR register regions from 0x000 to 0xFFF, color-coded by function type with bit-field annotations.
svg.text: 16 KB address space (0x000 – 0xFFF visible) · 32-bit word-aligned registers
Decode error on write; 0x0 on read
All registers 32-bit word-aligned. Byte enables supported on writes. Read-only (RO) registers return 0 on write.
Interface: AXI4-Lite, 32-bit data bus. Addresses not listed are reserved and decode to DECERR / 0x0.
